creator: carlavilla@FreeBSD.org
text:
Graham, it would be very good if you can add some information to these pages:

* https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/arch-handbook/parti/
* https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/arch-handbook/partiii/
* https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/developers-handbook/parti/
* https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/developers-handbook/partv/

Basically an introduction of this part of the book.
I'm gonna add PauAmma and debdrup, maybe them can help us with that :)
